name: leadtime
description: Work with Leadtime data and workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Leadtime tasks, projects, and workspace data.
interface.longDescription: Use the Leadtime MCP server from Codex when the user asks to inspect or update Leadtime tasks, projects, workspace data, or sends a Leadtime link. Use Public API guidance only when the user is building scripts or external integrations.
defaultPrompt: Help me update this Leadtime task.
Build a Leadtime Public API integration.
